text: Brent crude at ~$106/bbl (+47% since Feb 28). The global energy crisis is now in its sixth week. What began as a short term shock is showing multiple signs of long term and structural shifts with implications for EV demand. Markets where March EV sales appear to break pre-existing trend: France (+69% YoY), Sweden (+30% YoY), Australia (+94.7% YoY). Germany (+66.2% YoY) and Denmark (+42.6% YoY) are on watch — growth is strong but may partly reflect subsidy timing or base effects.
